context7.description: Live documentation lookup — powers /docs command. No key required.

playwright.description: Browser automation and testing via Playwright

github.description: GitHub — PRs, issues, code search, repo ops. Needs: GitHub PAT (Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens).

_comments.active: Edit ~/.claude/mcp.json to enable servers. Keep under 5 active to preserve context window.
_comments.keyless_now: context7 and playwright are active — no keys needed.
_comments.when_ready: Add github and exa-web-search to ~/.claude/mcp.json once you have the API keys.
